tagline: Convert any camera RAW to DNG in your browser. No upload. No server.
tool.title: RAW → DNG converter
tool.dropzone.text: Drop a RAW file here, or click to choose
tool.dropzone.hint: Supports CR3 / CR2 / NEF / ARW / RAF / ORF / RW2 and more
warn.largeFile: Large file — conversion may take 15–30 seconds and use a lot of memory.
warn.unsupportedBrowser: Your browser does not seem to support WebAssembly. This tool will not run.
privacy.note: This tool runs entirely in your browser. Files are never uploaded.
